site.name: Exile Codex
site.tagline: AI-crafted Path of Exile 2 build guides
site.blurb: A growing library of deeply-reasoned PoE2 builds. Every guide pairs a written field manual with a fully interactive Path of Building embed — pan the passive tree, hover the gear, read the numbers.

guides.title: Sanguine Detonation
guides.summary: A witch who pays for her spells in blood, curses everything, then detonates those curses in chains of chaos explosions. Life is her damage stat.
